name: HWR_WEB_POST
description: This table is to be used to store the Web Posts from the social medila websites in our database

columns.Name: WEB_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the Id of the web post used to uniquely identify the record.

columns.Name: SRC_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the web post id associated with this post.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the profile id of the person who made this post.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the id of the social media source from where this post was obtained.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: This represents the URL of this post in the corresponding social media site.

columns.Name: IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: This represents the url of the image associated with this web post.

columns.Name: MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This represents the content of the web post that this record represents.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This represents the description attribute associated with this web post.

columns.Name: METADATA
columns.Comments: This represents the metadata associated with the web post

columns.Name: POST_CREATED_ON
columns.Comments: This column represents the date when this web post was created.

columns.Name: POST_UPDATED_ON
columns.Comments: This column represents the date when this web post was updated.

columns.Name: POST_CREATION_TIME
columns.Comments: This column represents the time when this web post was created.

columns.Name: LIKE_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the like count associated with this web post.

columns.Name: SHARE_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the share count associated with this web post.

columns.Name: COMMENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the comment count associated with this web post.

columns.Name: TAG_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column represents the tag count associated with this web post.

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the type of the web post object this record is representing.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the conversation id related with web post.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
